response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed and found to contain no audio or music. It consists entirely of text-based slides, which were used to define the scene boundaries. As no vocal songs were detected, the vocal music fields are set to false or null.
response.global_summary: A silent, text-based farewell message from the Vtuber Nanashi Mumei, consisting of several pages of text expressing gratitude to her fans. There is no music or singing in the video.

scenes.description: Text message: 'You have truly changed my life for the better. Wherever I go, no matter what I face, I will remember you!' with Japanese translation.

Text message: 'I will always carry the kindness and support you showed me in my heart. I was able to do more than I ever imagined because of you. I will never forget this feeling!' with Japanese translation.
Text message: 'I hope that my presence in hololive was a good one. Any moment of joy I might have brought someone makes me even happier to be alive!' with Japanese translation.
Text message: 'Thank you for being here with me.' with Japanese translation.
Text message: 'Thank you for giving me a warm space to be silly and have fun.' with Japanese translation.
Text message: 'Thank you for letting me be Nanashi Mumei.' with Japanese translation. Followed by a logo.
Blank screen at the end of the video.
